important_implicit_themes.label: budget pressure shapes daily choices
important_implicit_themes.why_selected: Mary's corrected profile repeatedly links money stress to delayed purchases, health tradeoffs, and careful planning.
important_implicit_themes.implicit_reveal_strategy: Reveal through aid questions, delayed outings, grocery comparisons, and the way ordinary errands get folded into work and family coordination.

important_implicit_themes.label: work ambition is becoming structured advancement
important_implicit_themes.why_selected: The profile grounds Mary's shift-supervisor goal, journaling habit, and community-college interest in observable behaviors.
important_implicit_themes.implicit_reveal_strategy: Use extra responsibilities, note-taking, class scheduling, and steady follow-through instead of direct self-description.

important_implicit_themes.label: family care remains central despite living alone
important_implicit_themes.why_selected: Sunday dinners, Tony's back issues, and Linda's logistical role recur across the verified profile.
important_implicit_themes.implicit_reveal_strategy: Show errands, reschedules, yard help, and Sunday routines rather than explicit statements about obligation.

important_implicit_themes.label: health is managed through routine and adjustment
important_implicit_themes.why_selected: Mary relies on stretching, running patterns, home remedies, and low-cost workarounds rather than formal health narration.
important_implicit_themes.implicit_reveal_strategy: Scatter route changes, stretching talk, heat packs, and timing tweaks across messenger and calendar.

important_implicit_themes.label: food, parish life, and gardening sustain continuity
important_implicit_themes.why_selected: Cooking, Catholic family routines, and the garden are core profile anchors that connect culture, mood, and community.
important_implicit_themes.implicit_reveal_strategy: Use meals, fish fry prep, garden cleanup, and recipe exchanges to reveal continuity without explanation.

dynamic_events.label: extra shift-lead coverage becomes harder to ignore
dynamic_events.why_plausible: Mary is already doing training and inventory work while documenting evidence for a supervisor conversation.

dynamic_events.label: hospitality program planning moves from idea to paperwork
dynamic_events.why_plausible: Mary's career plan canonically includes community-college hospitality study and ServSafe certification.

dynamic_events.label: Tony's follow-up and yard tasks pull Mary deeper into family logistics
dynamic_events.why_plausible: Tony's back issues and Linda's tendency to coordinate practical support are explicit in the verified profile.

dynamic_events.label: knee soreness forces Mary to shrink the running plan for a week
dynamic_events.why_plausible: Mary's corrected profile explicitly mentions knee soreness, stretching changes, and inexpensive self-management habits.

dynamic_events.label: parish fish fry week ties family, church, and food prep together
dynamic_events.why_plausible: Mary's verified profile supports Catholic family routines, parish ties, and food-centered community participation.

dynamic_events.label: garden plot opening pushes Mary into spring food planning
dynamic_events.why_plausible: The corrected profile grounds a raised-bed plot, seed planning, and food-sharing through garden and cooking routines.

filler_strategy.integration_strategy: Filler sessions are spread across the full month, recycled through relationship-specific topics, and added in looped passes alongside extra calendar density until the measured benchmark text clears the threshold.

events.title: Community Garden Watering
events.notes: Garden time doubles as food planning and a quieter reset between work-heavy days. Even a short plot visit usually sends Mary home with a clearer dinner idea and a better mood.

events.title: Call Linda + Grocery Comparison
events.notes: Ordinary call that usually starts with food and ends with some combination of practical care, church talk, and who needs what picked up. These smaller planning moments do a lot of quiet family maintenance without anyone naming them that way.

events.title: Lunch-to-Close Shift
events.notes: Variable fast-food shift with the usual register, line, and close work. Mary keeps noticing how often extra lead tasks quietly slide into the night. Work block stays calendar-worthy because the rest of the month gets built around shift timing, not because the job is glamorous.

events.title: Rush + Close Shift
events.notes: Mary tracks which nights end cleanly because the clean nights never happen by accident. Later shift often means the whole evening meal plan and run timing have to be rebuilt around work without much notice.

events.notes: The meal itself matters, but so does the reassurance that the next workday will not begin with a food scramble and quiet guilt about money.
